mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, product_id, request_id, order_amount, order_status, fail_reason, create_source, created_at, updated_at FROM t_order WHERE id = #{orderId} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, product_id, request_id, order_amount, order_status, fail_reason, create_source, created_at, updated_at FROM t_order WHERE id = #{orderId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order ( id, user_id, product_id, request_id, order_amount, order_status, fail_reason, create_source ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{requestId}, #{orderAmount}, #{orderStatus}, #{failReason}, #{createSource} )
